augments.desc:
Autocast:
Periodically throws an axe at the nearest opponent, dealing physical damage, slowing, and shredding their armor and magic resist. Picking up the axe reduces its Cooldown.
augments.name: And My Axe!
augments.tooltip:
Autocast: Throws an axe at the nearest opponent every @Cooldown@s, dealing @TotalDamage@ physical damage, Slowing the target for @SlowAmount*100@% for @SlowDuration@s, and shredding @ShredAmount*100@% Armor and Magic Resist for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.

Picking up this axes reduces its Cooldown (%i:cooldown%) to @CDIfPickedUp@s.
